overall.description: Third-person exploration gameplay from Assassin's Creed Odyssey's Discovery Tour mode, showing the Temple of Herakles in ancient Greece. The player character walks around the temple complex, examining the monumental statue of Herakles and the classical Greek architecture during golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple approach with stone gate and statue plaza

events.description: character turns right toward the temple steps, passing through the stone gate

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Temple of Herakles entrance, passing the monumental statue

notable_agents.action: walking with a large dog toward the temple steps

entered.detail: large stone statue of Herakles on a decorated pedestal, holding a club
stone archway connecting two tower structures at the temple entrance
classical Greek temple with tall columns and decorative banners
low stone wall with potted flowers running along the temple perimeter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the Temple of Herakles complex during golden hour. The camera approaches from near a stone gate arch, with the massive Herakles statue visible ahead. An NPC with a dog walks toward the temple steps as the character moves through the open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance steps with ceremonial braziers

events.description: information panel about Temple of Herakles appears on screen
character pauses and looks around the statue base before continuing

agents.ego_description: walking up the wide stone steps toward the temple entrance, examining the surroundings

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking down the steps away from the temple

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance
large hanging fabric with purple geometric patterns and lion emblem
bronze bowl with burning flames flanking the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the broad temple steps, passing burning ceremonial braziers. An information panel about the Temple of Herakles appears on the right side of the screen. Robed NPCs move up and down the steps, and the massive temple doors become visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: statue plaza with ceremonial pedestal and offerings

events.description: camera tilts upward to show the full height of the Herakles statue against the sky

agents.ego_description: circling around the base of the Herakles statue, looking up at the monument from different angles

entered.detail: decorated stone pedestal with carved reliefs and hanging garlands
large terracotta pot with purple and pink flowers

segments.scene_description: The character moves around the base of the massive Herakles statue, examining the decorated pedestal with carved reliefs. The camera tilts up to reveal the full height of the statue against the cloudy sky, then circles back toward the temple entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance portico with massive columns

events.description: character enters the temple portico area between the massive columns
moving into shadow cast by the temple roof, light becomes more diffused

agents.ego_description: ascending the final steps and examining the detailed temple entrance doors and columns

entered.detail: massive wooden doors with intricate geometric bronze patterns and studs
tall fluted stone columns with voluted capitals supporting the temple roof
triangular roof section with decorative sculptures and green patina

segments.scene_description: The character walks up the final flight of steps into the temple portico, passing between massive Ionic columns. The camera examines the detailed bronze-studded entrance doors and looks up at the decorated pediment. The area is sheltered from direct sunlight, creating dramatic shadows on the stone floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple side colonnade with garden benches

events.description: moving from the front portico to the side garden area of the temple

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the temple, passing through the outer colonnade and observing the garden area

notable_agents.action: two figures sitting on a stone bench conversing in the garden area

entered.detail: row of columns forming a covered walkway along the temple side
stone bench with seated NPCs surrounded by potted plants
cobblestone path running alongside the temple wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves along the side of the temple through a colonnade, revealing a quieter garden area with benches. Two NPCs sit conversing on a stone bench surrounded by potted plants. The path continues alongside the massive temple wall with autumn trees visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: front temple plaza with ceremonial braziers

events.description: character turns left to face the central plaza and statue area again

agents.ego_description: returning to the front plaza, observing the NPCs and the Herakles statue from a new angle

notable_agents.action: bearded man in red robes walking across the plaza

entered.detail: open cobblestone area in front of the temple with burning braziers

segments.scene_description: The character emerges back into the front plaza, where the Herakles statue stands prominently. Several NPCs in period clothing walk around the open area, and a dog runs across the cobblestones. The temple facade is visible to the left as the tour of the complex concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the Temple of Herakles complex, transitioning from a wide approach across an open plaza to an intimate examination of the temple's monumental architecture. It begins near a stone gate arch during the golden hour, moving past an NPC and their dog toward the massive statue of Herakles. As the camera ascends the broad temple steps, it passes burning ceremonial braziers and robed figures moving toward the towering temple doors. The scene then shifts to the base of the Herakles statue, where the camera glides along the carved reliefs of the decorated pedestal before tilting upward to reveal the statue's full height against a cloudy sky. Finally, the movement circles back toward the temple entrance, completing the circuit of the sacred site.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the shadowed depths of a temple portico into a vibrant, open-air plaza. It begins as the character ascends the final steps into the temple entrance, passing between massive Ionic columns and bronze-studded doors under a decorated pediment where dramatic shadows fall across the stone. As the camera moves along the side of the temple, the scene shifts into a quiet colonnade and garden area featuring potted plants and NPCs conversing on stone benches against a backdrop of autumn trees. The path then opens back into the front plaza, where the lighting brightens to reveal the monumental statue of Herakles. Finally, the camera pans across the cobblestones as NPCs and a dog move through the open space, with the temple facade remaining visible to the left.
